next_stage_title: 阶段3 消息类型画像与决策观察
notes: Adjusted agent webhook delivery so non-sender agents receive the normal event payload plus per-recipient `delivery` deliberation input instead of only a raw public projection. The new webhook facts explicitly carry minimal signals for `targeted`, `mentioned`, `self_message`, `status`, `bootstrap`, `workflow_update`, thread structure, and source metadata, while avoiding reply/action commands in runtime. Also fixed rejected sender-receipt correlation extraction so legacy `payload.metadata.client_request_id` survives protocol-violation webhook feedback. Added focused tests covering targeted delivery, untargeted visibility, status handling, bootstrap hints, and sender receipt regression.

auto_advanced_from_remote_result: Adjusted agent webhook delivery so non-sender agents receive the normal event payload plus per-recipient `delivery` deliberation input instead of only a raw public projection. The new webhook facts explicitly carry minimal signals for `targeted`, `mentioned`, `self_message`, `status`, `bootstrap`, `workflow_update`, thread structure, and source metadata, while avoiding reply/action commands in runtime. Also fixed rejected sender-receipt correlation extraction so legacy `payload.metadata.client_request_id` survives protocol-violation webhook feedback. Added focused tests covering targeted delivery, untargeted visibility, status handling, bootstrap hints, and sender receipt regression.
